text: The category of chairs and the category of living things do not overlap. The group of living things and the group of inanimate objects are mutually exclusive. A portion of inanimate objects are not chairs.

premise1.subject: chair
premise1.raw_text: The category of chairs and the category of living things do not overlap.

premise2.subject: living thing
premise2.raw_text: The group of living things and the group of inanimate objects are mutually exclusive.

conclusion.subject: inanimate object
conclusion.raw_text: A portion of inanimate objects are not chairs.

validity_details.reason: Two negative premises (Fallacy of Exclusive Premises)
